EDHI898 Pre-Candidacy Research (1-8 Credits) Formerly: EDPL898.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY

EDHI899 Doctoral Dissertation Research (1-8 Credits) Registration required to the extent of 6-9 hours for an Ed.D. Project and 12-18 hours for a Ph.D. Dissertation. Formerly: EDPL899.

EDMS645 Quantitative Research Methods I (3 Credits) Research design and statistical applications in educational research: data representation; descriptive statistics; estimation and hypothesis testing. Application of statistical computer packages is emphasized.
